name: Castling Rights Query
description: Same piece map as companion state variant with full castling rights.

name: State Variant
description: Near-identity position with side-to-move and castling-state differences.

name: Material Down Piece
description: Same structure but white is down a knight.

name: Material Collapse Endgame
description: Extreme material collapse used for a deterministic low-similarity demo.

name: Castled Structure
description: Both sides developed with white king castled.

name: Uncastled Structure
description: Similar material and placement but white king remains central.

name: Blunder f3/e5/g4
description: Very similar board but tactically vulnerable.

name: Safe with ...Nc6
description: Slightly less structurally similar but tactically healthier than the blunder line.

name: Fool's Mate Final
description: Checkmate endpoint from the blunder line.
